query: SELECT id, title, status, category, client, created_at FROM portfolio_drafts WHERE title LIKE '%제조시설%' OR title LIKE '%SBA%' OR title LIKE '%SETEC%' OR title LIKE '%휴레이%' OR title LIKE '%페이퍼랩%' OR title LIKE '%LAB543%' OR title LIKE '%허시드%' OR client LIKE '%SBA%' OR client LIKE '%SETEC%' OR client LIKE '%휴레이%' OR client LIKE '%페이퍼랩%' OR client LIKE '%LAB543%' OR client LIKE '%허시드%' ORDER BY id;
